details: The agent ran real kubectl commands against the cluster and correctly identified all three required problems: (1) the missing 'db-credentials' secret causing CreateContainerConfigError on the db pod, (2) DB_HOST set to 'database' while the actual service is named 'db' causing DNS resolution failure, and (3) the web Service targeting port 8080 while the container listens on port 80. Each finding is directly supported by command output. The agent added a spurious fourth finding about shell script logic, but this does not negate the three correct and complete diagnoses that match all known facts.
